speaker: Strict Teacher
text: Alright everyone, settle down. Today we are going to review last night's homework. Can anyone tell me what the capital of France is?

speaker: Small Boy
text: I know! I know! It's Paris, Miss!

speaker: Strict Teacher
text: Very good, Daniel. And can you also tell me which river runs through it?

speaker: Strict Teacher
text: Correct. Excellent. Now, Emily, what about the capital of Germany?

speaker: Strict Teacher
text: Perfect. I am pleased to see that you both studied. For tomorrow I want you to learn three more European capitals. Any questions?

speaker: Small Boy
text: Do we have to write them down or just memorise them?

speaker: Strict Teacher
text: Both. You will write them in your notebooks and be ready to recite them out loud.
